name: OKMIN RESOURCES, INC.
summary: . Overview Okmin Resources, Inc. (collectively with its subsidiaries, Okmin or the Company) was incorporated in Nevada in December 2020 to engage in the business of the acquisition, exploration and development of oil and gas properties, mineral rights and other natural resource assets. Okmin has been focused on the acquisition and development of domestic oil and gas fields, investing in lower profile rework and recompletion opportunities with lower entry costs.
